sources.title: AI Observability traces
conventions: Separate sessions, traces, generations, and spans from deterministic product verification

sources.title: Capturing events
conventions: Capture meaningful state changes and use object-verb names for custom events

sources.title: Install the Node.js SDK for logs
conventions: Use the current technical-doc convention: ingestion project tokens start with phc_; reject phx_ personal API keys. This overrides the inconsistent phs_ row in the docs style guide
